name: integration_i_analyzed_963k_ios_apps__471k_reviews_
method: I analyzed 963k iOS apps + 471k reviews I've built too many apps that people downloaded and then... never paid for. Not a cent. So i did what any sane person would do and went full spreadsheet goblin

phases.name: fetch
steps: iTunes Search API: top 100 apps per category (25 categories = 2500 apps)
App Store review endpoint: pull 50 most recent reviews per app (no key needed)

phases.name: score
steps: Sentiment score reviews — extract frustrated keywords (hate, crashes, broken, misleading, subscription trap)
Revenue proxy heuristic: log10(rating_count) * (5 - avg_rating) — high ratings volume + low score = captive demand

phases.name: output
steps: Rank top-25 trapped-demand apps, write LEDGER/APP_FACTORY_OPPORTUNITIES.csv
Inject top picks into app_factory_command_center.py --inject flag as pre-validated queue
Run engagement_bait_converter.py on findings — generate teardown thread for posting queue
